kirundi.scatter_for_relationships_line_for_tim: Ubwiyunge ku isano, umurongo ku gihe, inkingi ku byiciro, histogram ku miterere y'ikwirakwizwa, box plot ku gukwirakwira + ibidasanzwe, ogive ku byegeranye. Guhitamo ubwoko bubi bw'imbonerahamwe akenshi byayobya kuruta gutanga amakuru.
kirundi.mean_vs_median_median_wins_for_skewed_: Impuzandengo vs hagati (hagati itsinda ku makuru aberamye), gutandukana gisanzwe vs IQR (IQR itsinda ku makuru atari asanzwe), isano vs gutera (isano nke NTABWO igaragaza ko nta sano y'igitera).
kirundi.ap_stats_data_literacy_items_each_ques: Ibintu bya AP Stats / ubumenyi bw'amakuru. Buri kibazo gihuza n'amakuru akora kugira ngo ushobore kugenzura mu maso mbere yo gusubiza.
kirundi.paste_from_google_sheets_generate_samp: Komeka uvuye muri Google Sheets, kora amakuru y'icyitegererezo, ohereza nka PNG/CSV. Abanyeshuri benshi bagereranya make ukuntu isesengura ry'amakuru nyaryo ari ISUKURA ry'amakuru (~70% by'igihe cyose).
kirundi.set_a_true_population_r_then_watch_how: Shyiraho r nyayo y'abaturage, hanyuma urebe uko ingano y'icyitegererezo, urusaku, n'ibidasanzwe bigoreka r yagaragaye. Nta manota, nta guhishura — kora inyifatizo unashakishe.
kirundi.x_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Ihuriro X ku ngingo nshya y'amakuru
kirundi.y_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Ihuriro Y ku ngingo nshya y'amakuru
kirundi.sample_size_interpret_r_with_n_in_mind: Ingano y'icyitegererezo — sobanura R² wibuka n
kirundi.add_data_points_to_see_statistics: Ongeraho ingingo z'amakuru kugira ngo ubone sitatisitiki
kirundi.need_variation_in_y_values: Hakenewe itandukaniro mu duciro twa Y
kirundi.y_value_for_z_score_calculation: Agaciro Y ku ibara rya score Z
kirundi.select_a_quiz_type_and_click_start_qui: Hitamo ubwoko bw'ikizamini hanyuma ukande "Tangira Ikizamini"!
kirundi.swap_x_and_y_values: Vunja uduciro twa X na Y
kirundi.transformations_modify_data_in_place_u: 💡 Ihindurwa rihindura amakuru aho ari. Koresha Garura (↩) kugira ngo usubize.
kirundi.generate_20_points_with_a_target_corre: Kora ingingo 20 zifite imbaraga z'isano zigamijwe:
kirundi.watch_how_statistics_change_as_each_po: Reba uko sitatisitiki ihinduka uko buri ngingo igaragazwa imwe ku yindi.
kirundi.observed_r_matches_the_true_population: r yagaragaye ihuye na r nyayo y'abaturage mu 0.05.
kirundi.observed_r_is_off_by_0_05_0_15_expecte: r yagaragaye ikaba 0.05-0.15. Biteganyijwe ku n nto cyangwa urusaku ruringaniye.
kirundi.observed_r_differs_by_0_15_0_30_a_real: r yagaragaye itandukanye na 0.15-0.30. Ingaruka nyayo ishobora kugaragara nke (cyangwa ibinyuranye).
kirundi.observed_r_is_wildly_off_0_30_outliers: r yagaragaye ikaba cyane (>0.30). Ibidasanzwe cyangwa n nto cyane bishobora guhindura icyerekezo kigaragara burundu.
kirundi.set_true_population_r_sample_size_nois: Shyiraho r nyayo y'abaturage, ingano y'icyitegererezo, urusaku, ibidasanzwe. Hanura uko r yagaragaye ikaba. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_single_change_mo: Inyifatizo yawe (ni iyihe mpinduka imwe igoreka cyane r yagaragaye?)
kirundi.e_g_2_outliers_at_n_20_do_more_damage_: urug., ibidasanzwe 2 kuri n=20 bitera ibyangiritse byinshi kuruta ibidasanzwe 10 kuri n=200...
kirundi.can_outliers_flip_the_sign_of_r_try_tr: Ese ibidasanzwe bishobora guhindura ikimenyetso cya r? Gerageza r nyayo=+0.7 hamwe n'ibidasanzwe 3.
kirundi.how_does_increasing_n_reduce_the_noisy: Kongera n bigabanya bite imiterere y'igereranyo gifite urusaku?
kirundi.when_does_noise_sd_swamp_the_true_sign: Ni ryari SD y'urusaku irengera burundu ikimenyetso nyacyo - r isa ite icyo gihe?
kirundi.why_is_r_alone_never_enough_to_publish: Kuki r yonyine itigeze ihagije gutangaza? Ni iki kindi kigomba kuyiherekeza (CI, ubwiyunge, igenzura ry'imbaraga)?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu uyu mvange wa n, urusaku, n'ibidasanzwe utera iri tandukaniro.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Igikoresho cy'ubushakashatsi - nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gusuka ibisubizo. Amakuru asanzwe akoresha imbuto ihamye iva mu duceri, bityo umwanya umwe w'akaceri buri gihe usubiramo isasagura imwe. Ubushakashatsi nyabwo bubona isasagura imwe kandi bugomba gutekereza ku kutamenya neza.
